MINI MINUTES: JPT: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff JQ Properties, LP is present. Represented by Jacky Li.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lee Paul Lily Loke is present.
Attorney Bejan D. Fanibanda appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec-07-2015 is vacated. (JPT/501)
